response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior generalist with deep TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile experience, but the role requires 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows plus SQL Server/Oracle and fixed-income or capital-markets domain knowledge. C++ exposure is limited to ~6 months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a bachelor-thesis project, with no Windows-platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle depth, and no financial-services background. The mandatory criteria are not met.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD background
Polyglot with low-latency systems experience (DLang at Sociomantic)
Excellent communication: workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ (2014–2015), not 5–10 years
No Windows-platform C++ or SQL Server/Oracle experience
No fixed-income, capital-markets, or investment-banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
